title: Duzzit Bathroom Wipes-Pack Of 50, Blue
features: DUZZIT BATHROOM WIPES: Perfect for all round bathroom surface cleaning. Safe with antibacterial properties, kills 99.9 Percentof bacteria
KILLS BACTERIA & GERMS: The antibacterial formula kills 99.9 Percentof bacteria, leaving a clean, hygienic surface and a long-lasting fresh scent

PERFECTLY CLEAN: Duzzit Bathroom wipes quickly eliminate bacteria, leaving baths, sinks, showers, toilet seats and handles hygienically clean for longer. Formula is gentle but tough enough to remove dirt, grime and soap scum
HYGIENIC: The large Duzzit Bathroom wipes removes 99.9 Percentbacteria from all bathroom surfaces, leaving a clean hygienic surface and a long lasting fresh scent
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Each resealable pack contains 50 wipes
description: Product Description Duzzit Bathroom Wipes are perfect for all round bathroom surface cleaning. These extra strong wipes are tough enough to eliminate dirt, grime and soap scum for quick and easy cleaning. Securely re-seal pack between uses to prevent the wipes drying out. After use dispose of the wipe in household bin. Each pack contains 50 wipes Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Iodopropynyl, butylcarbamate, Sodium Benzoate, Methylisothiazolinone
